featuredMemories.title: Shut Up and Dance
featuredMemories.memory: Big obvious road-trip energy. Swap this for one of your actual playlist tracks if needed.

featuredMemories.title: Can't Feel My Face
featuredMemories.memory: A proper 2015 timestamp — the kind of song that instantly places the trip in that summer.

featuredMemories.title: Lean On
featuredMemories.artist: Major Lazer & DJ Snake feat. MØ
featuredMemories.memory: Good fit for the long sunny stretches through California and the desert.

featuredMemories.title: The Nights
featuredMemories.memory: Feels like a travel montage song. Very on-theme for a 90-day trip.

featuredMemories.title: Renegades
featuredMemories.memory: Works well for the parks and wide-open-road side of the site.

featuredMemories.title: See You Again
featuredMemories.memory: A natural closing-track vibe for the end of the trip.
